transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meadowbrook Family Clinic scheduling line. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Fenwick. It's currently on Thursday.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, Marlene. What day would you like to move the appointment to?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Actually, I've been having chest pain and getting really short of breath the last couple days, so maybe sooner would be better.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, I can look at earlier openings. I have Monday at 9 AM or Tuesday at 2 PM available.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I've booked you for Monday at 9 AM with Dr. Fenwick. You'll get a text confirmation shortly.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Marlene. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
